## Meeting Purpose

[Design team interview with Sebastien Powell for a Senior to Principal Design Engineer role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sebastien has extensive experience in design, front-end, and back-end development across various startups and projects](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [He demonstrated strong skills in creating design systems, custom e-commerce solutions, and full-stack development](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly growing and evolving their product development processes, with plans for significant team expansion](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [The interview process includes a time-boxed design and build assignment to evaluate candidates holistically](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

## Topics

### Sebastien's Background and Experience

  - [Studied business but transitioned to design and development](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Founded GetAgent (realtor comparison site) and ProVal (software for realtors)](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Worked on various projects including Airfinity, The New (life sciences), and Health.com](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Developed skills across design, front-end, and back-end development](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Created custom e-commerce solutions and design systems](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Project Showcase

  - [Demonstrated AI-powered lead generation interface design](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Presented ABBA and Arthur, a custom-built e-commerce site for dog accessories](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Showed redesign work for Health.com, including search experience improvements](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Displayed a custom support portal built for Plain's client using Next.js and GraphQL](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2993.0)

### GrowthX's Current State and Processes

  - [Tech stack: React, Tailwind, Radix components, TypeScript](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Product development is evolving as the team has grown rapidly in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3278.0)
  - [Six-week sprint cycles with reassessment and potential team adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3403.0)
  - [Renato and Daniel (CTO) shape product areas and create initial wireframes/flows](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3295.0)
  - [Teams work in lanes (product, framework, infrastructure) tackling different platform parts](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3357.0)

### Design Approach and Philosophy

  - [Sebastien prefers minimalist, clean, and polished designs](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
  - [Emphasizes the importance of design systems and component libraries](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Focuses on improving user experiences while balancing business needs](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)

### Interview Process Next Steps

  - [Time-boxed design and build assignment to be given](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Holistic evaluation of aesthetic choices, communication, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Final conversation likely to follow the successful completion of the assignment](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Decision expected within a few days](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review the interview and make a decision on moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [If proceeding, Sebastien to receive a design and build assignment](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Sebastien to wait for feedback, expected within a few days](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Potential final conversation to follow successful completion of the assignment](https://fathom.video/share/xzRxeUGg1pxzL1ng8xE1L_rnTuxBxreZ?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
